ideation: This sequence mimics the "aha!" moment often associated with a lightbulb emoji. It starts with arms relaxed, transitions to an upward reach as if grasping an idea, and ends with a triumphant gesture. The left arm's movement is more expressive, while the right arm provides balance. In the first frame, both arms are at rest. In the second frame, the left arm rises and reaches upward, as if grasping an idea. The right arm moves only slightly. In the third frame, the left arm moves slightly further up and curves slightly to suggest a successful grasp of the idea. The right arm moves forward slightly in balance. In the fourth frame, both arms move slightly downward, with the left arm moving more dramatically to convey the feeling of the idea being 'secured'. In the fifth frame, both arms return to a relaxed state.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, calm before the spark
left arm shoots up, grasping a new idea
the idea solidifies, right arm shifts for balance
the lightbulb moment is secured with a flourish
both arms relax, the idea is understood
